title: cenchrus schweinfurthii
intro: Cenchrus schweinfurthii, also known as the African stinkgrass, is a type of grass native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cenchrus schweinfurthii include its ability to treat fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-haemorrhagic agent. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of ailments in traditional African medicine.
